issue_title: [Fix #1979] Stop Refresh Animation on Popup When Content Script is Not Injected
issue_body_preview:
- [x] I agree to license my contribution under GPL-3.0 and agree to allow distribution on app stores as outlined in [LICENSE-APPSTORE](https://github.com/ajayyy/SponsorBlock/blob/master/LICENSE-APPSTORE.txt)

***

This is a follow up of PR #1979. My last fix relied on the content script sending
test_description_zh: 在浏览器扩展弹出窗口（popup）中，当内容脚本未注入到当前页面时（例如在浏览器内部页面如 chrome://extensions 或 about:blank），打开 SponsorBlock 的弹出窗口，观察加载/刷新动画的状态。
expected_result_zh: 当内容脚本未注入当前页面时，弹出窗口的刷新动画应在合理时间内自动停止，而不是无限旋转。弹出窗口应正常显示无法连接或不可用的状态提示，不会出现一直转圈的卡死状态。
